0x00000000000014aA86C5d3c41765bb24e11bd7.role: Ekubo Core singleton (virtual pools + the till inventory; the snapshot vault)

vault.role: the Ekubo CORE singleton (the till): every pool's inventory is a Core token balance — the swap pulls the input INTO Core (payFrom) and withdraws the output FROM it; the harness funds it with the captured balances.
